text:
Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering both Medicare and Medicaid data, for having Alzheimer's or related dementia Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
ALZRDSD_MEDICAID Alzheimer's Disease Related Disorders or Senile Dementia Indicator - Medicaid-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm
